description: 20-document corpus for system operator role BM25Plus regression gate

documents.title: Linux System Administration
documents.body: Linux system administrators manage user accounts file permissions process scheduling and network configuration. systemd controls service lifecycle.
documents.description: Core tasks and tools for Linux system administration

documents.title: Log Analysis and Monitoring
documents.body: Centralised log management with ELK stack or Loki enables searching aggregating and alerting on application and infrastructure logs.
documents.description: Log collection analysis and monitoring strategies

documents.title: Network Security Hardening
documents.body: Firewall rules iptables nftables and security groups control inbound and outbound traffic. Network segmentation limits blast radius of breaches.
documents.description: Hardening network infrastructure against intrusion

documents.title: Backup and Disaster Recovery
documents.body: Backup strategies include full incremental and differential backups. Recovery time objective RTO and recovery point objective RPO define disaster recovery goals.
documents.description: Planning and implementing backup and recovery procedures

documents.title: Container Orchestration with Kubernetes
documents.body: Kubernetes schedules containers across nodes. Pods deployments services and ingress resources constitute the core Kubernetes resource model.
documents.description: Managing containerised workloads with Kubernetes

documents.title: SSL/TLS Certificate Management
documents.body: Let's Encrypt provides free TLS certificates via the ACME protocol. Certificate rotation and automated renewal prevent expiry-related outages.
documents.description: Managing TLS certificates and HTTPS configuration

documents.title: Performance Tuning Linux Kernel
documents.body: Kernel parameters in sysctl control network buffer sizes file descriptor limits and scheduler behaviour. Tuning improves throughput and latency.
documents.description: Linux kernel parameter tuning for high-performance systems

documents.title: Database Replication Setup
documents.body: PostgreSQL streaming replication synchronises data between primary and standby servers. Failover promotes a standby when the primary fails.
documents.description: Configuring database replication for high availability

documents.title: Ansible Automation Playbooks
documents.body: Ansible playbooks define idempotent infrastructure configuration tasks. Roles organise reusable automation across inventory groups.
documents.description: Infrastructure automation with Ansible playbooks

documents.title: Capacity Planning and Scaling
documents.body: Capacity planning forecasts resource requirements based on traffic growth projections. Auto-scaling policies react dynamically to load spikes.
documents.description: Planning and implementing system capacity scaling

documents.title: Incident Response Procedures
documents.body: Incident response follows detect contain eradicate and recover phases. Post-incident reviews identify root causes and prevent recurrence.
documents.description: Structured approach to handling production incidents

documents.title: DNS Configuration and Troubleshooting
documents.body: DNS resolves domain names to IP addresses. dig and nslookup diagnose resolution failures. DNSSEC adds cryptographic validation to DNS responses.
documents.description: Managing and debugging DNS configuration

documents.title: Secrets Management with Vault
documents.body: HashiCorp Vault stores and controls access to tokens passwords certificates and API keys. Dynamic secrets reduce long-lived credential risks.
documents.description: Secure secrets management with HashiCorp Vault

documents.title: Load Balancer Configuration
documents.body: HAProxy and Nginx act as reverse proxies and load balancers. Health checks remove unhealthy backends automatically from the pool.
documents.description: Configuring load balancers for high availability services

documents.title: Storage Systems and Filesystems
documents.body: NFS CIFS and Ceph provide networked storage. ext4 XFS and ZFS are common Linux filesystems with different performance and durability tradeoffs.
documents.description: Storage technologies and filesystem selection for operators

documents.title: Package Management and Patching
documents.body: Regular package updates apply security patches. Unattended upgrades automate security updates on Debian and Ubuntu systems.
documents.description: Managing system packages and applying security patches

documents.title: Log Rotation and Retention
documents.body: logrotate manages log file rotation compression and deletion. Retention policies balance storage costs against audit and debugging requirements.
documents.description: Configuring log rotation and retention policies

documents.title: System Hardening CIS Benchmarks
documents.body: CIS benchmarks provide configuration guidelines for secure system hardening. Lynis and OpenSCAP audit systems against these security baselines.
documents.description: Applying CIS hardening benchmarks to Linux systems

documents.title: Monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana
documents.body: Prometheus scrapes metrics from application endpoints. Grafana dashboards visualise time-series data. Alertmanager routes alert notifications.
documents.description: Setting up Prometheus and Grafana for system monitoring

documents.title: Cron Jobs and Scheduled Tasks
documents.body: Cron schedules recurring system tasks using time expressions. Systemd timers provide an alternative to cron with better logging and dependency handling.
documents.description: Managing scheduled tasks with cron and systemd timers
